The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] '''conquest''' of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kaikielius/Legends|Kaikielius]] was the first battle of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]-bound arm of the pre-[[Operation Shadow Hand|Shadow Hand]] [[Imperial Coalition|Imperial]] [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|offensive]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. The battle, which was followed by [[Battle of Metellos (Galactic Civil War)|attacks]] [[Battle of Alsakan (Galactic Civil War)|on]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]] and [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]],<ref name="Atlas" /> convinced the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] that an Imperial [[Second Battle of Coruscant|attack]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was imminent.<ref name="Dark Source" />
